case_title: DARRELL GRANT VS. JESUS A. KUBARA ESPINOZA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRANT, DARRELL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,800.00 FILED BY GRANT, DARRELL AS TO DEFENDANT KUBARA ESPINOZA, JESUS A. AKA JESUS ESPINOZA DBA SFC AUTO SALES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-15-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-15-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-17-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF INTENDS TO ADD AN ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT, VICTOR KUBARA. THE AMENDED COMPLAINT MUST BE SERVED ON BOTH DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT AND WAIVED SERVICE ON THE ORIGINAL COMPLAINT ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF MAY-17-2016 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
